taxonomy: Manteia acaulis is classified as a species within the genus Manteia, which is a part of the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification places Manteia acaulis within the order Apiales and the clade known as the core eudicots. The family Apiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, and Manteia acaulis is one of the many species within it. The classification of Manteia acaulis is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and root system. This classification is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies that have helped to clarify the relationships within the family Apiaceae.
